3279400.name: Locked Dream
3279400.description:
Locked Dream plunges you into the depths of Ethan Hayes’ fractured subconscious, where dreams and reality collide in a gripping 5-hour single-player psychological adventure. Navigate a haunting, ever-shifting dreamscape packed with intricate puzzles, deadly traps, and choices that shape Ethan’s fate. Uncover the truth behind his nightmares or risk being trapped forever in a labyrinth of the mind.What’s Included in the Full Game:

  • 5-Hour Single-Player Campaign: A complete, immersive journey through Ethan’s story, with richly layered narrative and multiple endings based on your choices.

  • Complex Puzzles: Solve challenging environmental and logic-based puzzles to unlock hidden paths, reveal Ethan’s memories, and piece together the mystery.

  • Treacherous Exploration: Brave a surreal world filled with deadly traps and unpredictable shifts, where every step tests your cunning and reflexes.

  • Deep Choice-Driven Narrative: Make impactful decisions that influence the story’s direction, relationships, and outcomes, with branching paths that encourage replayability.

  • Stunning Atmospheric World: Lose yourself in a meticulously crafted dreamscape, brought to life with hand-drawn visuals, haunting sound design, and an evocative original soundtrack.

Why Play Locked Dream?Dive into a psychological odyssey that blends suspense, mystery, and emotional depth. With multiple endings and a web of secrets to unravel, every choice pulls you deeper into Ethan’s mind. Perfect for fans of narrative-driven adventures and mind-bending puzzles, Locked Dream challenges you to escape the nightmare or redefine what it means to be free.
3279400.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
